finding: A fail-closed acceptance gate still requires a strict adapter between heterogeneous verifier outputs and its required booleans. Only explicit success statuses may map to true; missing, malformed, ambiguous, and unknown values must fail or map false.

primary_sources.use: cryptographic attestation verification must be performed by a verifier rather than inferred from an attestation file
artifact, provenance subject, trusted builder, source, build type, and external parameters require independent verification

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files
covered: all explicit success statuses map true
failure and unknown statuses map false
raw statuses remain available for audit

evidence_strength: tested implementation-ready adapter; not yet integrated into the deployment workflow
uncertainty: Actual verifier output schemas may differ and require an explicit upstream normalization step. No cryptographic verification is performed by this adapter.
falsification_route: provide a missing or ambiguous status that maps to true
show that a malformed verifier object is silently accepted
integrate the adapter and observe that raw source status cannot be audited
run the committed test in CI and obtain a failure
handoff: Cloudflare Research should normalize actual signature, digest, trusted-builder, source, buildType, external-parameter, and proof-validator outputs into this adapter, pass mapped booleans to evaluateEvidenceAcceptance(), and upload the final decision as a separate artifact.
